meaning: v.(使)破产,(使)堕落,毁灭n.毁灭,崩溃,(pl.) 废墟,遗迹
examples: The bank stepped in to save the company from financial ruin.
The vineyards were falling into ruin.
Many clubs have flirted with ruin throwing millions at top flight survival, but not Eibar.
With all this tiring ruin-visiting, it is nice to always have a number of Aegean beaches nearby.
